topic: HIIT 对中老年人 VO2max 的影响

pico.population: middle aged aged elderly older adult* senior*
pico.intervention_or_exposure: high intensity interval training HIIT sprint interval training interval exercise high-intensity intermittent exercise
pico.outcomes: VO2max maximal oxygen uptake maximal oxygen consumption peak oxygen uptake aerobic capacity cardiorespiratory fitness
pico.study_design_preference: RCT / systematic review / meta-analysis / clinical trial

searches.query: (high intensity interval training[Title/Abstract] OR HIIT[Title/Abstract] OR sprint interval training[Title/Abstract] OR interval exercise[Title/Abstract]) AND (VO2max[Title/Abstract] OR maximal oxygen uptake[Title/Abstract] OR maximal oxygen consumption[Title/Abstract] OR peak oxygen uptake[Title/Abstract] OR aerobic capacity[Title/Abstract] OR cardiorespiratory fitness[Title/Abstract]) AND (middle aged[Title/Abstract] OR aged[Title/Abstract] OR elderly[Title/Abstract] OR older adult*[Title/Abstract] OR senior*[Title/Abstract]) AND (randomized controlled trial[Publication Type] OR clinical trial[Publication Type] OR systematic review[Publication Type])
